uplink.description: Battery, ambient temperature, relative humidity (climate core + battery volts)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Battery Status level=3.0V eos=0, ambient_temperature=22.0, relative_humidity=45.0) and normalizing per the vocabulary.

uplink.description: Temperature, humidity, ambient light intensity (climate + light categories)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (ambient_temperature=30.0, relative_humidity=50.0, light_intensity=500) and mapping light_intensity -> air.lightIntensity (lux).
Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (ambient_temperature=-10.0, relative_humidity=35.0).

uplink.description: Light alarm flag, MCU temperature, temperature, humidity (extras alongside climate)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (light_alarm=1, mcu_temperature=26.5, ambient_temperature=20.0, relative_humidity=40.0). light_alarm is a categorical flag -> extra lightAlarm; mcu_temperature is board temperature -> extra mcuTemperature, not ambient air.

uplink.description: Battery end-of-shelf-life flag set (bit 7) with climate readings
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Battery Status level=3.0V eos_alert=1). The EOS flag (bit 7) maps to the extra batteryEndOfShelfLifeAlert; the low 7 bits still give 3.0 V.
Synthetic error vector: the agriculture data uplink is only defined on fPort 10. Upstream reports this as data.error "Wrong port: 42"; our codec returns an errors[] entry per the output contract.
Synthetic error vector: header 0x99 is not in the decoder table. Upstream reports "Couldn't find header ... in decoder object"; our codec returns an errors[] entry.
